name: TaikoWatcher Bot
description: Telegram bot that monitors $TAIKO token liquidity across 10 centralized exchanges (Binance, Bybit, OKX, KuCoin, Gate.io, HTX, Bitget, MEXC, Upbit, Bithumb). Computes composite liquidity scores, detects anomalies (wide spreads, volume spikes/drops, cross-exchange price gaps, Kimchi premium), and sends real-time alerts to market makers.
